creator: chrcoluk@gmail.com
text:
running reboot to reboot server causes a kernel page fault leaving local
access needed to reboot server.

dmesg and log below

unfortunately no longer have dump got overwritten from another page fault
for other problem

Fix: 

I recompiled world with -O not the default -O2 this appears to stop it occuring.
How-To-Repeat: reboot the server
